```{=typst}
#pagebreak()
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// FINAL PAGE — RECOMMENDED NEXT STEP (The Money Script)
// Editorial, author-voice recommendation framed as the natural continuation of
// the guide. Balanced two-column composition: left = serif headline + short
// editorial paragraphs + a single calm CTA; right = the Money Script visual as
// the hero, with generous white space. Same brand system as the rest of the
// guide (ivory ground, gold keyline, deep-green type, gold accents). No page
// number, no urgency, no hype — a trustworthy, premium print recommendation.
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
#wcg-nums.update(false)
#set page(numbering: none)
#place(top + left, dx: -(mg-x - 0.55in), dy: -(mg-y - 0.5in),
  rect(width: 7.4in, height: 10in, stroke: 0.75pt + c-gold, radius: 3pt))
#v(1fr)
#grid(
  columns: (1fr, 1fr),
  column-gutter: 28pt,
  align: (left + horizon, center + horizon),
  // ---- LEFT: editorial recommendation ----
  [
    #set par(justify: false, leading: 0.72em, spacing: 10pt)
    #text(font: ("Manrope",), size: 11pt, weight: 600, tracking: 3pt, fill: c-gold)[RECOMMENDED NEXT STEP]
    #v(12pt)
    #text(font: ("Cormorant Garamond",), size: 25pt, weight: 700, fill: c-deep)[
      Take the Next Step\
      in Your Financial\
      Journey
    ]
    #v(10pt)
    #line(length: 24%, stroke: 1pt + c-gold)
    #v(14pt)
    #set text(font: ("Manrope",), size: 10.5pt, fill: c-body)

    You've already started noticing how small habits and repeated choices
    influence your financial confidence. That awareness is often the first step
    toward creating lasting change.

    If you'd like to understand why those patterns developed in the first place,
    the free Money Script presentation offers another perspective that many
    readers find helpful after finishing this guide.

    It explores how early beliefs and repeated experiences can quietly shape the
    way people think about earning, saving, spending, and financial
    opportunities.

    It's completely separate from this guide, but it complements what you've
    just learned and may help you continue building stronger financial habits.

    #v(16pt)
    #link("https://399ebep0yf69650bpihrv-vewe.hop.clickbank.net")[
      #box(width: 100%, fill: c-deep, radius: 6pt, inset: (x: 22pt, y: 15pt))[
        #align(center, text(font: ("Manrope",), size: 11.5pt, weight: 700, fill: c-ivory)[
          Watch the Free Money Script Presentation #sym.arrow.r
        ])
      ]
    ]
    #v(10pt)
    #text(font: ("Manrope",), style: "italic", size: 9pt, fill: c-num)[
      This recommendation is provided for readers who want to continue exploring
      the topic. It contains an affiliate link.
    ]
  ],
  // ---- RIGHT: the Money Script visual (hero) ----
  [
    #image("assets/images/money-script-mockup.jpg", width: 100%)
  ],
)
#v(1fr)
```
